title: alangium villosum subsp. ferrugineum
intro: Alangium villosum subsp. ferrugineum is a subspecies of the Alangium villosum plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. Alangium villosum subsp. ferrugineum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
